		<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Package' xmi:id='_18_3_95202a9_1467352286653_912223_44646' name='Constraints'>
			<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Class' xmi:id='_18_3_95202a9_1467352296866_982803_44647' name='FrictionForce'>
				<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 18.5'>
					<modelExtension/>
				</xmi:Extension>
				<ownedRule xmi:type='uml:Constraint' xmi:id='_18_3_95202a9_1467352296876_756202_44649'>
					<constrainedElement xmi:idref='_18_3_95202a9_1467352296866_982803_44647'/>
					<specification xmi:type='uml:OpaqueExpression' xmi:id='_18_3_95202a9_1467352296876_476540_44650'>
						<body>normalForce=(pressure*1000000*((caliperdiameter/2)^2)*PI)-springForce-caliperFrictionForce</body>
						<language>Built-in Math</language>
					</specification>
				</ownedRule>
				<ownedAttribute xmi:type='uml:Port' xmi:id='_18_3_95202a9_1467352782232_249210_44680' name='caliperFrictionForce' visibility='private' aggregation='composite'>
					<type href='ISO-80000.mdzip#_18_0beta_903028d_1388650180214_448107_64653'>
						<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 18.5'>
							<referenceExtension referentPath='ISO-80000::ISO80000-4 Mechanics::Quantities::force::force[newton]' referentType='DataType'/>
						</xmi:Extension>
					</type>
				</ownedAttribute>
				<ownedAttribute xmi:type='uml:Port' xmi:id='_18_3_95202a9_1467352782271_275333_44694' name='normalForce' visibility='private' aggregation='composite'>
					<type href='ISO-80000.mdzip#_18_0beta_903028d_1388650180214_448107_64653'>
						<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 18.5'>
							<referenceExtension referentPath='ISO-80000::ISO80000-4 Mechanics::Quantities::force::force[newton]' referentType='DataType'/>
						</xmi:Extension>
					</type>
				</ownedAttribute>
				<ownedAttribute xmi:type='uml:Port' xmi:id='_18_3_95202a9_1467352782325_665885_44722' name='pressure' visibility='private' aggregation='composite'>
					<type href='ISO-80000.mdzip#_18_0beta_903028d_1388650194980_101191_146098'>
						<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 18.5'>
							<referenceExtension referentPath='ISO-80000::ISO80000-4 Mechanics::Quantities::pressure::pressure[megapascal]' referentType='DataType'/>
						</xmi:Extension>
					</type>
				</ownedAttribute>
				<ownedAttribute xmi:type='uml:Port' xmi:id='_18_3_95202a9_1467352782376_350535_44750' name='caliperdiameter' visibility='private' aggregation='composite'>
					<type href='ISO-80000.mdzip#_18_0beta_903028d_1388650194409_437777_142358'>
						<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 18.5'>
							<referenceExtension referentPath='ISO-80000::ISO80000-3 Space and Time::Quantities::diameter::diameter[metre]' referentType='DataType'/>
						</xmi:Extension>
					</type>
				</ownedAttribute>
				<ownedAttribute xmi:type='uml:Port' xmi:id='_18_3_95202a9_1467352782400_367134_44764' name='springForce' visibility='private' aggregation='composite'>
					<type href='ISO-80000.mdzip#_18_0beta_903028d_1388650180214_448107_64653'>
						<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 18.5'>
							<referenceExtension referentPath='ISO-80000::ISO80000-4 Mechanics::Quantities::force::force[newton]' referentType='DataType'/>
						</xmi:Extension>
					</type>
				</ownedAttribute>
			</packagedElement>
			<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Class' xmi:id='_18_3_95202a9_1467356320471_570894_44864' name='HeatConstraint'>
				<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 18.5'>
					<modelExtension/>
				</xmi:Extension>
				<ownedRule xmi:type='uml:Constraint' xmi:id='_18_3_95202a9_1467356320482_969417_44866'>
					<constrainedElement xmi:idref='_18_3_95202a9_1467356320471_570894_44864'/>
					<specification xmi:type='uml:OpaqueExpression' xmi:id='_18_3_95202a9_1467356320482_724860_44867'>
						<body>heat &lt;= 53</body>
					</specification>
				</ownedRule>
				<ownedAttribute xmi:type='uml:Port' xmi:id='_18_3_95202a9_1467356432119_524309_44897' name='heat' visibility='private' aggregation='composite'>
					<type href='ISO-80000.mdzip#_18_0beta_903028d_1388650198324_789359_167620'>
						<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 18.5'>
							<referenceExtension referentPath='ISO-80000::ISO80000-4 Mechanics::Quantities::output power::output power[kilowatt]' referentType='DataType'/>
						</xmi:Extension>
					</type>
				</ownedAttribute>
			</packagedElement>
			<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Class' xmi:id='_18_3_95202a9_1467357033536_521700_44917' name='Speeding'>

				</xmi:Extension>

					<constrainedElement xmi:idref='_18_3_95202a9_1467357033536_521700_44917'/>
					<specification xmi:type='uml:OpaqueExpression' xmi:id='_18_3_95202a9_1467357033539_50521_44921'>
						<body>speed = time</body>
					</specification>
				</ownedRule>
				<ownedAttribute xmi:type='uml:Port' xmi:id='_18_3_95202a9_1467357033538_866672_44919' name='speed' visibility='private' aggregation='composite'/>
			</packagedElement>

				<ownedRule xmi:type='uml:Constraint' xmi:id='_18_3_95202a9_1467624329853_642475_45005'>
					<constrainedElement xmi:idref='_18_3_95202a9_1467624329853_86734_45004'/>
					<specification xmi:type='uml:OpaqueExpression' xmi:id='_18_3_95202a9_1467624329868_169839_45009'>
						<body>verdict = expr ? &quot;pass&quot; : &quot;fail&quot;</body>
						<language>JavaScript</language>
					</specification>
				</ownedRule>
				<ownedAttribute xmi:type='uml:Port' xmi:id='_18_3_95202a9_1467624329853_508293_45006' name='verdict' visibility='private' aggregation='composite'>
					<type href='http://www.omg.org/spec/SysML/20150709/SysML.xmi#_SysML_Requirements_PackageableElement-VerdictKind_PackageableElement'>
						<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 18.5'>
							<referenceExtension referentPath='SysML::Requirements::VerdictKind' referentType='Enumeration' originalID='_11_5EAPbeta_be00301_1147937844838_242658_2617'/>
						</xmi:Extension>
					</type>
				</ownedAttribute>
				<ownedAttribute xmi:type='uml:Port' xmi:id='_18_3_95202a9_1467624329853_460859_45007' name='expr' visibility='private' aggregation='composite'>
					<type href='http://www.omg.org/spec/SysML/20150709/SysML.xmi#_SysML_Libraries_PackageableElement-PrimitiveValueTypes_PackageableElement-Boolean_PackageableElement'>
						<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 18.5'>
							<referenceExtension referentPath='SysML::Libraries::PrimitiveValueTypes::Boolean' referentType='DataType' originalID='_16_5_1_12c903cb_1245415335546_39033_4086'/>
						</xmi:Extension>
					</type>
				</ownedAttribute>
			</packagedElement>
			<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Class' xmi:id='_18_3_95202a9_1467624241259_673856_44987' name='MuEquation'>
				<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 18.5'>
					<modelExtension/>
				</xmi:Extension>
				<ownedRule xmi:type='uml:Constraint' xmi:id='_18_3_95202a9_1467624241263_547710_44988'>
					<constrainedElement xmi:idref='_18_3_95202a9_1467624241259_673856_44987'/>
					<specification xmi:type='uml:OpaqueExpression' xmi:id='_18_3_95202a9_1467624241271_111240_44992'>
						<body>mu = (pavement == &quot;wet&quot;) ? 0.6 : 0.8</body>
						<language>js</language>
					</specification>
				</ownedRule>
				<ownedAttribute xmi:type='uml:Port' xmi:id='_18_3_95202a9_1467624241264_343137_44989' name='pavement' visibility='private' aggregation='composite' type='_18_3_95202a9_1467624309305_901292_44998'>
					<defaultValue xmi:type='uml:InstanceValue' xmi:id='_18_3_95202a9_1467624241271_841484_44993' instance='_18_3_95202a9_1467624309305_764211_45000'/>
				</ownedAttribute>
				<ownedAttribute xmi:type='uml:Port' xmi:id='_18_3_95202a9_1467624241265_695791_44990' name='mu' visibility='private' aggregation='composite'>
					<type href='http://www.omg.org/spec/SysML/20150709/SysML.xmi#_SysML_Libraries_PackageableElement-PrimitiveValueTypes_PackageableElement-Real_PackageableElement'>
						<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 18.5'>
							<referenceExtension referentPath='SysML::Libraries::PrimitiveValueTypes::Real' referentType='DataType' originalID='_11_5EAPbeta_be00301_1147431819399_50461_1671'/>
						</xmi:Extension>
					</type>
				</ownedAttribute>
			</packagedElement>
			<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Class' xmi:id='_18_3_95202a9_1467624592062_826706_45219' name='StoppingDistanceTable'>
				<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 18.5'>
					<modelExtension/>
				</xmi:Extension>
				<ownedRule xmi:type='uml:Constraint' xmi:id='_18_3_95202a9_1467624676276_776785_45257' name='RSD'>
					<constrainedElement xmi:idref='_18_3_95202a9_1467624592062_826706_45219'/>
					<specification xmi:type='uml:OpaqueExpression' xmi:id='_18_3_95202a9_1467624676276_897621_45258'>
						<body>required_distance = (((initial_speed)*(1000/3600))^2)/(2*mu*9.822)</body>
						<language>Built-in Math</language>
					</specification>
				</ownedRule>
				<ownedRule xmi:type='uml:Constraint' xmi:id='_18_3_95202a9_1467625466636_768953_45763'>
					<constrainedElement xmi:idref='_18_3_95202a9_1467624592062_826706_45219'/>
					<specification xmi:type='uml:OpaqueExpression' xmi:id='_18_3_95202a9_1467625466636_562469_45764'>
						<body>stopping_distance &lt;=required_distance</body>
					</specification>
				</ownedRule>
				<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 18.5'>
					<modelExtension>
						<ownedDiagram xmi:type='uml:Diagram' xmi:id='_18_3_95202a9_1467624814448_914955_45268' name='Mu Constraint' visibility='public' context='_18_3_95202a9_1467624592062_826706_45219' ownerOfDiagram='_18_3_95202a9_1467624592062_826706_45219'>
							<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 18.5'>

		<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Class' xmi:id='_18_3_be00301_1467894771574_753147_47883' name='sd_no_matlab'>
			<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 18.5'>
				<modelExtension/>
			</xmi:Extension>
			<ownedRule xmi:type='uml:Constraint' xmi:id='_18_3_be00301_1467894771592_679829_47914'>
				<constrainedElement xmi:idref='_18_3_be00301_1467894771574_753147_47883'/>
				<specification xmi:type='uml:OpaqueExpression' xmi:id='_18_3_be00301_1467894771599_440101_47915'>
					<body>sd = ((speed*1000/3600)*(speed*1000/3600))/(2*(2 * numBrakingWheels * (brakeTorque)/(0.0254*rollingDiam/2)/grossMass))</body>
				</specification>
			</ownedRule>
			<generalization xmi:type='uml:Generalization' xmi:id='_18_3_be00301_1467894789228_318297_47955' general='_18_3_95202a9_1467623552136_748362_44696'/>
		</packagedElement>
		<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:Class' xmi:id='_18_3_be00301_1467895145241_494824_48094' name='heatNoMatlab'>
			<xmi:Extension extender='MagicDraw UML 18.5'>
				<modelExtension/>
			</xmi:Extension>
			<ownedRule xmi:type='uml:Constraint' xmi:id='_18_3_be00301_1467895145283_990299_48097'>
				<constrainedElement xmi:idref='_18_3_be00301_1467895145241_494824_48094'/>
				<specification xmi:type='uml:OpaqueExpression' xmi:id='_18_3_be00301_1467895145283_144304_48098'>
					<body>wheelRPM =  vehicleSpeed*(1000/60)/(pi*tireDiam*0.0254);
effectiveRadius = (od-width)/2;
effectiveSpeed = 2*pi*(effectiveRadius)*(wheelRPM/60);
frictionForce = brakeMu*normalForce;
surfaceArea = centerLength*width;
wearRate = 9.8225e-15*frictionForce*effectiveSpeed/surfaceArea;
heat = 0.8*frictionForce*effectiveSpeed/1000;
brakeTorque = frictionForce*effectiveRadius;
life = (thickness-0.000254)/wearRate;</body>
				</specification>
			</ownedRule>
			<generalization xmi:type='uml:Generalization' xmi:id='_18_3_be00301_1467895145263_712373_48096' general='_18_3_95202a9_1467377106180_612571_44417'/>
		</packagedElement>
		<packagedElement xmi:type='uml:InstanceSpecification' xmi:id='_18_3_be00301_1467894946862_212292_47981' name='sdnm'>
			<classifier xmi:idref='_18_3_be00301_1467894771574_753147_47883'/>
		</packagedElement>

Part catalogs are imported from Catalogs.xlsx Excel file using copy/paste to tables capability.
Then table is evaluated,
derived values are calculated and verified against requirements.</text>
		<active xmi:idref='_18_3_be00301_1467988248535_245241_53197'/>
	</mdElement>
